# Sami Halawa — AI Product and Engineering Portfolio

Sami Halawa is a founder-engineer in Madrid building multilingual AI products, agent systems, applied AI workflows and technical education.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://samihalawa.com/): Profile, current focus and selected work
- [Projects](https://samihalawa.com/projects): Curated products plus 84 public work records
- [Case studies](https://samihalawa.com/case-studies): Detailed product and engineering case studies
- [Services](https://samihalawa.com/services): AI product, automation, training and advisory services
- [CV](https://samihalawa.com/cv): Complete professional profile
- [Blog](https://samihalawa.com/blog): Technical articles on AI agents, product engineering and deployment
- [Contact](https://samihalawa.com/contact): Project and role enquiries

## Public profiles

- [GitHub](https://github.com/samihalawa)
- [Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/samihalawa)
